rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" applied to a polished academic prose fragment most directly targets sentence and paragraph quality — tightening redundancy, smoothing transitions, improving word choice and register — making writing polish the load-bearing responsibility. R1.1 and R1.5 are peripherally touched (contribution framing clarity and local narrative flow may benefit incidentally) but neither is independently load-bearing under this delegation.
